author: Haroen Viaene
subject: docs(stories): remove bindEvent from examples (#5448)
body:
* fix(sendEvent):  correct types in template

sendEvent is only passed in cases bindEvent is as well (hits, infinitehits), and this means  `?.` in the docs can be removed before sendEvent

* make types pass

* docs(stories): remove bindEvent from examples

it doesn't work with `html`, so there's no point in continuing to have examples using it.

* Update packages/instantsearch.js/stories/infinite-hits.stories.ts

* Apply suggestions from code review

* oh, it needs to be a function of course
